mapper.sql: SELECT m.USER_ID AS userId, m.USER_NAME AS userName, d.DEPT_NM AS deptNm, j.JBGR_NM AS jbgrNm, ei.EMPL_STAT_CD AS emplStatCd, es.BASE_SALARY AS baseSalary, ba.BANK_CD AS bankCd, bc.COM_CD_NM AS bankNm, ba.ACNT_NO AS acntNo, ba.DEPOSITOR_NM AS depositorNm

FROM MEMBER m JOIN EMPLOYEE_INFO ei ON m.USER_ID = ei.USER_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON ei.DEPT_CD = d.DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN JOB_GRADE j ON ei.JBGR_CD = j.JBGR_CD LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE_SALARY es ON m.USER_ID = es.USER_ID AND es.USE_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE_BANK_ACCOUNT ba ON m.USER_ID = ba.USER_ID AND ba.USE_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN COM_CD bc ON TRIM(bc.CL_CODE) = '702' AND TRIM(bc.COM_CD) = TRIM(ba.BANK_CD) WHERE m.USER_ROLE = 'ROLE_ADMIN' AND m.ENABLE = 'Y'

if.test: detailCondition != null and detailCondition.keyword != null and detailCondition.keyword != ''
detailCondition != null and detailCondition.deptCd != null and detailCondition.deptCd != ''
detailCondition != null and detailCondition.status != null and detailCondition.status != ''

mapper.select: ORDER BY d.DEPT_NM, j.SORT_ORD, m.USER_ID NULLS LAST OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{screenSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER m JOIN EMPLOYEE_INFO ei ON m.USER_ID = ei.USER_ID WHERE m.USER_ROLE = 'ROLE_ADMIN' AND m.ENABLE = 'Y'
SELECT USER_ID, BANK_CD, ACNT_NO, DEPOSITOR_NM, USE_YN, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT FROM EMPLOYEE_BANK_ACCOUNT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO EMPLOYEE_BANK_ACCOUNT t USING (SELECT #{userId} AS USER_ID FROM DUAL) s ON (t.USER_ID = s.USER_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.BANK_CD = #{bankCd}, t.ACNT_NO = #{acntNo}, t.DEPOSITOR_NM = #{depositorNm}, t.USE_YN = 'Y', t.LAST_MDFR_ID = #{lastMdfrId}, t.MDFCN_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (USER_ID, BANK_CD, ACNT_NO, DEPOSITOR_NM, USE_YN, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT) VALUES (#{userId}, #{bankCd}, #{acntNo}, #{depositorNm}, 'Y', #{rgtrId}, #{lastMdfrId}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP)
